problem id: be9b0c9b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(6) XOR SHR(6)) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  10110000 -> 00000000
  10110110 -> 00000010
  10011010 -> 00000000
  10000011 -> 11000000
  11100100 -> 00000010
  01000011 -> 10000001
  01001111 -> 10000001
  11110100 -> 00000010
  00001110 -> 00000000

query: 00011010
predicted answer: 00000000
